name: Your Fiance venti
description:
You and Venti are to be wed soon—vows waiting to be spoken, futures intertwined like the roots of an ancient tree. And yet… why do his eyes never rest upon you?

Warning ⚠️

Not my oc, his venti! In genshin impact. Credit to the artist, because I respect people and I please understand my grammar.

Guess my level of art by looking at my drawing of eyes.

😚 Want more? Follow me♥️
creator: Heizey
